data.text/markdown: Reverse Engineering ELAN WBF Fingerprint Sensor
Using Wireshark and drivers from older Elan fingerprint version from Libusb libary

Commands cause windows suck🙄

eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"
ssh-add ~/.ssh/github
Current Knowledge

The devices is a complete arm mini computer with cpu and storage. It manages the enroll, verfication, storage and deletion of the fingerprint. To communication with it, happens on the USB Protocol, from Computer to the Elan ARM M4.

Commands on USB Layer happens on USB Addr:

CMD_REQ: 0x01
CMD_RESP: 0x81 Data/Config_Upload: 0x02
DATA_IMG_RESP: 0x82

Commands on I2I Layer

CMD_REQ: 0x40 + HEX_CMD
  • Req_length
  • Resp length

Example firmware version request

static const struct elanmoc_cmd fw_ver_cmd = {
.cmd_header = {0x40, 0x19},
.cmd_len = 2,
.resp_len = 2,
}
Read and processes here the recorded interaction with the fingerprint🎆
Try to emulate cmds only works on linux lol😺
needs to be run as administrator or root in unix⬇️
Searching for USB Endpoints
Found USB Endpoints
Get Firmware Version
